MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Mercy Housing California is present. Represented by Paul Lam.
Attorney Daniel Bornstein appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Willmare Arterberry is present.
Attorney Erin Katayama representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Ora Prochovnick, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of JAN-14-2013 is vacated.
